heading: Selective early removal from the reserve active-status list
label: 14704 Selective early removal from the reserve active-status list
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3850 and 8850 of this title, prior to repeal by , (c)(3).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(3)

children.heading: .—Boards To Recommend Officers for Removal From Reserve Active-Status List
children.label: a .—Boards To Recommend Officers for Removal From Reserve Active-Status List

children.text: Whenever the Secretary of the military department concerned determines that there are in any reserve component under the jurisdiction of the Secretary too many officers in any grade and competitive category who have at least 30 years of service computed under or at least 20 years of service computed under , the Secretary may convene a selection board under to consider officers on the reserve active-status list who are in that grade and competitive category, and who have that amount of service, for the purpose of recommending officers by name for removal from that list.section 14706 of this titlesection 12732 of this titlesection 14101(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: that of the most junior officer in that grade and competitive category whose name is submitted to the board; and

children.label: B
children.text: that of the most senior officer in that grade and competitive category whose name is submitted to the board.

children.label: A
children.text: has been approved for voluntary retirement; or

children.label: B
children.text: is to be involuntarily retired under any provision of law during the fiscal year in which the board is convened or during the following fiscal year.

children.heading: .—Specification of Number of Officers Who May Be Recommended for Separation
children.label: b .—Specification of Number of Officers Who May Be Recommended for Separation
children.text: The Secretary of the military department concerned shall specify the number of officers described in subsection (a)(1) that a board may recommend for separation under subsection (c).

children.heading: .—Separation of Officers Selected
children.label: c .—Separation of Officers Selected
children.text: In the case of an officer recommended for separation in the report of a board under subsection (a), the Secretary may separate the officer in accordance with .section 14514 of this title

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: d .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of the military department concerned shall prescribe regulations for the administration of this section.
